global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with promotional elements for a product.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited stock sale for BoltCart.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Three phone mockups
elements.description: Three stylized phone mockups with reflective screens arranged in a row.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small circular badge labeled 'UGC' in white text on a dark background.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small rectangular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold, contrasting text.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: A prominent text block stating 'Limited stock Only this weekend' in bold, clear font.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: The logo of 'BoltCart' displayed in a modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A bold button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' in a clear, inviting font.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small badge at the top corner indicating a sale, with the word 'SALE' prominently displayed.

elements.label: UGC tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, limited stock message, BoltCart logo.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main product visuals are centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
